requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Safety — EV Charging Equipment (General) — Austria
requirement_topic.zh: 低压安全——电动汽车充电设备（通用）——奥地利
requirement_topic.zht: 低壓安全——電動汽車充電設備（通用）——奧地利

summary.en: EV charging equipment placed on the Austrian / EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU, ensuring it is designed and manufactured to be safe when correctly installed and maintained. Equipment must meet the Essential Safety Requirements (Annex I) covering protection against electric shock, insulation, overcurrent/overtemperature protection, and clearances. Harmonised standard EN IEC 61851-1:2019 (Mode 1–4 conductive charging, AC and DC, general requirements) provides a presumption of conformity. In Austria, OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules apply alongside LVD; German-language instructions are expected.
summary.zh: 在奥地利/欧盟市场销售的电动汽车充电设备须符合低压指令2014/35/EU，确保其在正确安装及维护条件下安全运行。设备须满足附件I基本安全要求，涵盖防触电、绝缘、过流/过温保护及电气间隙。协调标准EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4传导充电，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。在奥地利，OVE（奥地利电工协会）电工技术规则与低压指令并行适用；须提供德语说明书。
summary.zht: 在奧地利/歐盟市場銷售的電動汽車充電設備須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU，確保其在正確安裝及維護條件下安全運行。設備須滿足附件I基本安全要求，涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、過流/過溫保護及電氣間隙。協調標準EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4傳導充電，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。在奧地利，OVE（奧地利電工協會）電工技術規則與低壓指令並行適用；須提供德語說明書。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-1:2019 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules for EV charging installations in Austria

summary.en: China commonly references GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements), which is technically aligned with IEC 61851-1 but incorporates national deviations. It is enforced under the GB framework administered by SAMR/SAC. GB/T 18487.1 testing and certification by a Chinese CNAS-accredited lab is NOT recognised as equivalent to EN IEC 61851-1 testing under the EU LVD conformity assessment pathway. Chinese manuals and labels do not satisfy the German-language requirement for Austria.
summary.zh: 中国常见参考标准为GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求），技术上与IEC 61851-1相关但含有国家偏差，由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会监督执行。国内CNAS认可实验室依据GB/T 18487.1出具的检测及认证，不被欧盟LVD合格评定程序直接认可为等同。中文手册和标签不满足奥地利德语要求。
summary.zht: 中國常見參考標準為GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求），技術上與IEC 61851-1相關但含有國家偏差，由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會監督執行。國內CNAS認可實驗室依據GB/T 18487.1出具的檢測及認證，不被歐盟LVD合格評定程序直接認可為等同。中文手冊和標籤不滿足奧地利德語要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: Exporters should build an EU conformity file against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-1:2019 testing as evidence for presumption of conformity. Existing Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test reports do not automatically substitute because scope, deviations, connector assumptions and documentation differ. For Austria: OVE rules must be verified additionally; German-language technical instructions and labels are required. EU Declaration of Conformity, CE marking, and German-language technical instructions are all required.
gap.zh: 出口商应围绕低压指令基本安全要求建立欧盟合规技术文件，并可采用EN IEC 61851-1:2019检测作为推定符合性的证据。现有GB/T 18487.1检测报告不会自动替代，因为范围、偏差、接口假设及文件要求不同。对于奥地利：须额外核实OVE规则；须提供德语技术说明书和标签。欧盟符合性声明、CE标志及德语技术说明书均为必须。
gap.zht: 出口商應圍繞低壓指令基本安全要求建立歐盟合規技術文件，並可採用EN IEC 61851-1:2019檢測作為推定符合性的證據。現有GB/T 18487.1檢測報告不會自動替代，因為範圍、偏差、接口假設及文件要求不同。對於奧地利：須額外核實OVE規則；須提供德語技術說明書和標籤。歐盟符合性聲明、CE標誌及德語技術說明書均為必須。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: Directive 2014/35/EU and CE marking before Austrian / EU market placement; OVE rules apply additionally in Austria; German-language documentation required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 18487.1 compliance required under SAMR framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is a voluntary harmonised standard that can grant presumption of conformity for general EV conductive charging. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 certification does not by itself satisfy the EU conformity assessment pathway. Austrian market additionally requires OVE compliance and German-language documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据LVD 2014/35/EU，CE标志为强制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用于电动汽车传导充电通用要求推定符合性的自愿协调标准。中国GB/T 18487.1认证本身不满足欧盟合格评定路径。奥地利市场还须满足OVE合规和德语文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據LVD 2014/35/EU，CE標誌為強制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用於電動汽車傳導充電通用要求推定符合性的自願協調標準。中國GB/T 18487.1認證本身不滿足歐盟合格評定路徑。奧地利市場還須滿足OVE合規和德語文件要求。

requirement_topic.en: DC Charging Station Safety — EV Conductive Charging (Austria)
requirement_topic.zh: 直流充电站安全——电动汽车传导充电（奥地利）
requirement_topic.zht: 直流充電站安全——電動汽車傳導充電（奧地利）

summary.en: DC charging stations (Mode 4, off-board chargers) placed on the Austrian / EU market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU where within scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station) is a current product standard that may be used as technical evidence and, where cited as harmonised, gives presumption of conformity; it is not itself the mandatory legal obligation. In Austria, OVE electrotechnical rules apply alongside LVD. German-language documentation and labelling are required for the Austrian market.
summary.zh: 投放奥地利/欧盟市场的直流充电站（模式4，非车载充电机）在适用范围内须符合低压指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（电动汽车传导充电系统——第23部分：直流电动汽车充电站）是现行产品标准，可作为技术证据使用；在被列为协调标准时，可产生推定符合性，但其本身并非强制性法律义务。在奥地利，OVE电工技术规则与低压指令并行适用。奥地利市场须提供德语文件和标签。
summary.zht: 投放奧地利/歐盟市場的直流充電站（模式4，非車載充電機）在適用範圍內須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第23部分：直流電動汽車充電站）是現行產品標準，可作為技術證據使用；在被列為協調標準時，可產生推定符合性，但其本身並非強制性法律義務。在奧地利，OVE電工技術規則與低壓指令並行適用。奧地利市場須提供德語文件和標籤。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (current edition, supersedes 2014)
OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules for DC charging installations in Austria

summary.en: China's DC charging station domestic equivalent is GB/T 18487.3-2001 (AC/DC electric vehicle charging station). The current DC system standard is GB/T 18487.5-2024 (DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 connector). The DC coupler standard is GB/T 20234.3-2023 (supports up to 1500 V / 800 A). CQC or CNAS certification to these Chinese standards is not accepted under the EU LVD CE marking pathway. Chinese documentation is not in German.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电站国内对应标准为GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流电动汽车充电站）。现行直流系统标准为GB/T 18487.5-2024（适用于GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充电系统）。直流耦合器标准为GB/T 20234.3-2023（支持最高1500V/800A）。依据上述中国标准获得的CQC或CNAS认证，在欧盟LVD CE标志合格评定路径下不被接受。中国文件不是德语。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電站國內對應標準為GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流電動汽車充電站）。現行直流系統標準為GB/T 18487.5-2024（適用於GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充電系統）。直流耦合器標準為GB/T 20234.3-2023（支持最高1500V/800A）。依據上述中國標準獲得的CQC或CNAS認證，在歐盟LVD CE標誌合格評定路徑下不被接受。中國文件不是德語。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.3-2001 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — AC/DC electric vehicle charging station (only published edition)
GB/T 18487.5-2024 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 5: DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 (current DC system standard)
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler (supersedes 2015 edition)

gap.en: DC charging stations exported to Austria should be assessed against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-23:2023 testing as presumption-of-conformity evidence where applicable. Particular attention is needed for: (1) CCS2 (Combined Charging System Type 2) connector compliance vs. Chinese GB/T connector; (2) isolation monitoring requirements per European grid topology (230/400 V); (3) ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 communication protocol compatibility vs. GB/T 27930. Additionally, OVE rules and German-language documentation are required for Austrian market acceptance. The connector type itself is a hardware gap — Chinese DC stations typically use GB/T 20234.3 plugs, which are not CCS2 compatible without hardware redesign.
gap.zh: 出口奥地利的直流充电站应针对LVD基本安全要求进行评估，并可在适用时采用EN IEC 61851-23:2023检测作为推定符合性证据。重点关注：（1）CCS2（组合充电系统2型）连接器合规性与中国GB/T连接器的差异；（2）欧洲电网拓扑（230/400 V）下的绝缘监控要求；（3）ISO 15118 / DIN 70121通信协议兼容性与GB/T 27930的差异。此外，奥地利市场验收须满足OVE规则和德语文件要求。连接器本身构成硬件差距——中国直流充电站通常使用GB/T 20234.3插头，未经硬件重新设计与CCS2不兼容。
gap.zht: 出口奧地利的直流充電站應針對LVD基本安全要求進行評估，並可在適用時採用EN IEC 61851-23:2023檢測作為推定符合性證據。重點關注：（1）CCS2（組合充電系統2型）連接器合規性與中國GB/T連接器的差異；（2）歐洲電網拓撲（230/400 V）下的絕緣監控要求；（3）ISO 15118 / DIN 70121通訊協定相容性與GB/T 27930的差異。此外，奧地利市場驗收須滿足OVE規則和德語文件要求。連接器本身構成硬體差距——中國直流充電站通常使用GB/T 20234.3插頭，未經硬體重新設計與CCS2不相容。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: CE marking under Directive 2014/35/EU where the charger is within LVD scope; OVE rules apply additionally in Austria; German-language documentation required; EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary technical standard for presumption of conformity support
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 18487.5-2024 is the current DC charging system standard; CCC mandatory from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC charging stations require CE marking under the applicable EU legislation including LVD where in scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary product standard used as technical evidence or presumption-of-conformity support; it is not mandatory in itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.3 certification is not accepted as an EU conformity assessment substitute. A significant hardware gap exists where Chinese DC stations use GB/T connectors incompatible with Austrian / EU CCS2 practice. OVE compliance and German-language documentation are additionally required for Austria.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 直流充电站须依据适用欧盟法律取得CE标志，其中在LVD范围内的产品须符合低压指令。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作为技术证据或推定符合性支持的自愿产品标准，并非自身强制。中国GB/T 18487.3认证不能替代欧盟合格评定。若中国直流充电站使用与奥地利/欧盟CCS2实践不兼容的GB/T连接器，则存在重大硬件差距。奥地利还须额外满足OVE合规和德语文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 直流充電站須依據適用歐盟法律取得CE標誌，其中在LVD範圍內的產品須符合低壓指令。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作為技術證據或推定符合性支持的自願產品標準，並非自身強制。中國GB/T 18487.3認證不能替代歐盟合格評定。若中國直流充電站使用與奧地利/歐盟CCS2實務不相容的GB/T連接器，則存在重大硬體差距。奧地利還須額外滿足OVE合規和德語文件要求。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation Safety — EV Charging in Buildings (IEC 60364-7-722) — Austria
requirement_topic.zh: 建筑内电动汽车充电电气安装安全（IEC 60364-7-722）——奥地利
requirement_topic.zht: 建築內電動汽車充電電氣安裝安全（IEC 60364-7-722）——奧地利

summary.en: EU member-state electrical installation law and grid/installer rules govern the building-side circuits supplying EV charging points. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 provide the commonly adopted technical installation route covering protective measures (RCD type B or A+DC detection), wiring, earthing, and load management. In Austria, OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules implement and may extend IEC 60364-7-722 requirements for Austrian installations. Exported EV chargers should be compatible with OVE / IEC 60364-7-722 installation requirements so they can be accepted by Austrian installers and DSOs. German-language instructions and wiring diagrams are expected.
summary.zh: 欧盟成员国电气安装法律及电网/安装方规则规范电动汽车充电点的建筑侧供电回路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技术安装路径，涵盖保护措施（B型RCD或A型+直流检测）、布线、接地及负荷管理。在奥地利，OVE（奥地利电工协会）电工技术规则执行并可扩展IEC 60364-7-722对奥地利安装的要求。出口欧盟的充电设备应与OVE/IEC 60364-7-722安装要求兼容，以便获得奥地利安装商及DSO接受。须提供德语说明书和接线图。
summary.zht: 歐盟成員國電氣安裝法律及電網/安裝方規則規範電動汽車充電點的建築側供電迴路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技術安裝路徑，涵蓋保護措施（B型RCD或A型+直流檢測）、布線、接地及負荷管理。在奧地利，OVE（奧地利電工協會）電工技術規則執行並可擴展IEC 60364-7-722對奧地利安裝的要求。出口歐盟的充電設備應與OVE/IEC 60364-7-722安裝要求相容，以便獲得奧地利安裝商及DSO接受。須提供德語說明書和接線圖。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364-7-722:2018 — Low-voltage electrical installations — Part 7-722: Requirements for special installations or locations — Supply of electric vehicles
HD 60364-7-722 (CENELEC harmonised document, adopted by EU member states)
OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical installation rules for Austria implementing and extending IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722

summary.en: China addresses EV charging installation primarily through GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure). These cover site design and installation but differ from IEC 60364-7-722 / OVE requirements in RCD type requirements, earthing system assumptions (TN-S vs. Chinese practice), and load management protocols. Chinese installation documentation is not accepted as evidence of compliance with Austrian OVE / IEC 60364-7-722 requirements.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范）及GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准）处理充电安装事宜。上述标准涵盖场地设计及安装，但在RCD类型要求、接地系统假设（TN-S与中国实践的差异）及负荷管理协议方面与IEC 60364-7-722/OVE要求存在差异。中国安装文件不被接受为符合奥地利OVE/IEC 60364-7-722要求的证据。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範）及GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準）處理充電安裝事宜。上述標準涵蓋場地設計及安裝，但在RCD類型要求、接地系統假設（TN-S與中國實踐的差異）及負荷管理協議方面與IEC 60364-7-722/OVE要求存在差異。中國安裝文件不被接受為符合奧地利OVE/IEC 60364-7-722要求的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD) (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)

gap.en: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / OVE rules govern fixed wiring and protection devices at the building side. Exported EV chargers should declare compatibility with Type B RCDs or incorporate internal DC fault protection to allow Type A RCDs under Austrian / EU installation practice. For Austria, OVE rules may impose additional requirements beyond the IEC 60364-7-722 baseline. A charger that requires installation conditions not achievable under Austrian OVE rules will fail field acceptance. Chinese charger datasheets often omit compatibility statements expected by Austrian installers and DSOs. German-language installation manuals and wiring diagrams are required.
gap.zh: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / OVE规则规范建筑侧固定布线及保护装置。出口奥地利/欧盟的充电设备应依据奥地利/欧盟安装实践声明与B型RCD兼容，或内置直流故障保护以允许使用A型RCD。对于奥地利，OVE规则可能在IEC 60364-7-722基线之外提出额外要求。若充电设备要求的安装条件在奥地利OVE规则下无法实现，将无法通过现场验收。中国充电设备产品规格书通常未包含奥地利安装商及DSO所期望的兼容性声明。须提供德语安装手册和接线图。
gap.zht: IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 / OVE規則規範建築側固定布線及保護裝置。出口奧地利/歐盟的充電設備應依據奧地利/歐盟安裝實務聲明與B型RCD相容，或內置直流故障保護以允許使用A型RCD。對於奧地利，OVE規則可能在IEC 60364-7-722基線之外提出額外要求。若充電設備要求的安裝條件在奧地利OVE規則下無法實現，將無法通過現場驗收。中國充電設備產品規格書通常未包含奧地利安裝商及DSO所期望的相容性聲明。須提供德語安裝手冊和接線圖。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation sits in Austrian electrical installation law and OVE rules; IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 are adopted technical standards commonly used to demonstrate accepted installation practice; product compatibility and German-language documentation are practical Austrian market requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966 / GB/T 51313 under MOHURD; not substitutable for Austrian OVE / IEC 60364-7-722 requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OVE rules and IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 govern building-side installation practice in Austria. EV chargers exported to Austria should be compatible with the RCD (Type B or A+DC) and earthing requirements expected by Austrian installers and DSOs under OVE rules. Chinese installation standards (GB 50966 / GB/T 51313) are not substitutes. German-language installation manuals and wiring diagrams are required for Austrian market acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] OVE规则和IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722规范奥地利建筑侧安装实践。出口奥地利的充电设备应与奥地利安装商及DSO在OVE规则下所期望的RCD（B型或A型+直流检测）和接地要求兼容。中国安装标准（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。奥地利市场验收须提供德语安装手册和接线图。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] OVE規則和IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722規範奧地利建築側安裝實務。出口奧地利的充電設備應與奧地利安裝商及DSO在OVE規則下所期望的RCD（B型或A型+直流檢測）和接地要求相容。中國安裝標準（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。奧地利市場驗收須提供德語安裝手冊和接線圖。
